query: Build a registration form with useForm that has email, password, and confirmPassword fields with Zod validation using zodValidator adapter
Our checkout form needs a dynamic field array for line items — each item has name, quantity, and price. Users should be able to add and remove items with pushValue/removeValue
I need async validation on the email field that checks uniqueness against /api/check-email on blur with a 500ms debounce using onChangeAsyncDebounceMs
Build a multi-step wizard form with 3 steps: personal info, address, and payment. Each step should validate its own fields before allowing progression
The form.Field children callback is not re-rendering when I type in the input — field.state.value stays empty. I'm using form.Field but my Input component doesn't call field.handleChange
Wire up our settings form to TanStack Query — load initial values from a useQuery hook and submit changes via useMutation with cache invalidation on success
Add error display below each field using field.state.meta.errors and disable the submit button using form.Subscribe to watch form.state.canSubmit
Convert our manual useState-based contact form to TanStack Form. We have 4 separate useState calls for name, email, subject, and message that need to move into useForm
I'm getting TypeScript errors on form.Field name='address.city' — how do I type nested fields properly with useForm<T> and access deeply nested field state?
Our form submission fires twice because we forgot e.preventDefault(). Also the Zod errors aren't showing because we're missing validatorAdapter: zodValidator() on useForm
Build a login page with email and password inputs using shadcn/ui Input and Button components styled with Tailwind
Validate the request body in our Elysia POST /users endpoint using Typebox t.Object with email and name fields
Create a Zod schema for our user profile data — name min 2 chars, email must be valid, age optional number between 0-150
Our React Hook Form integration is broken — the register function isn't binding to the input and validation messages don't appear
Set up Formik with Yup validation for our survey form with conditional fields that appear based on previous answers
Build a search bar component that debounces input and calls our API after the user stops typing for 300ms
Add client-side form validation to our HTML contact form using vanilla JavaScript — check required fields and email format before submission
Create a TanStack Table with sorting, filtering, and pagination for our users list fetched from the API
Our Drizzle insert query is failing with a type error — the schema expects a string for createdAt but we're passing a Date object
Write a controlled input component in React that formats phone numbers as the user types using onChange and local state
